attributes.action: Stop the sale of mincemeat in vacuum packaging
attributes.additional_details:
Vacuum packaging mincemeat is a structural travesty By extracting every pocket of air you aren’t just preserving meat you are crushing the texture into a dense rubbery brick.

​Proper mincemeat requires the aeration provided by traditional modified atmosphere packaging to maintain its granular integrity. Your current methods force consumers to massage a congealed mass back to life ruining the mouthfeel Stop prioritizing shelflife over culinary quality Return to breathable standards immediately
attributes.background: We request that the ground meat be returned to its original packaging. The vacuum-sealed product has been met with disfavor due to concerns regarding its cooking properties and flavor profile.

rejection.details: It is up to individual companies to decide how they package products as long as they meet the relevant rules.
